location: A random (4%) drop from any sword-and-shield Banished Knight; the most efficient farm is the lone Banished Knight patrolling just outside the southwestern exit of the Cathedral of Dragon Communion in Caelid.
tactics: Rest at the Cathedral of Dragon Communion grace, exit southwest to find the lone patrolling Banished Knight, kill it, and rest-reset to repeat.
Alternative farm spot: the Banished Knight guarding the dark room reached by descending from Stormveil Castle's Rampart Tower grace.
Dual-sword Banished Knights in Castle Sol and Crumbling Farum Azula have a much higher 7.8% drop rate but are tougher, faster fights.
Don't mistake this for the visually similar Banished Knight's Halberd or Greataxe carried by other Banished Knight variants — only the sword-and-shield type drops this greatsword.
lore: A finely engraved greatsword given to knights exiled from their homelands, whether for misfortune or misdeed, and sent to serve out their disgrace guarding the realm's frontier territories.

builds.name: Pure Strength Greatsword
builds.why: High base physical damage (142) with a low Dexterity requirement makes it a strong, simple two-handed Strength weapon.

builds.name: Quality Build
builds.why: Even D-rank scaling in both Strength and Dexterity rewards a balanced quality stat spread.
